london.introText: We film at London's leading event venues, from the sprawling halls of ExCeL to boutique conference spaces across the City. Our crews know the unique challenges of each space—parking, permits, power, lighting—and arrive prepped.

venues.name: ExCeL London
venues.description: Europe's largest exhibition and conference center. 100,000+ sq meters of flexible space hosting everything from tech conferences to major trade shows.
venues.filmingTips: Massive halls mean wireless mic range is critical. Bring backup power. Permit required; we handle it.

venues.name: Olympia London
venues.description: Historic 40,000 sq meter venue in West Kensington. Host to The RDS, travel expos, and industry conferences. Iconic architecture and challenging lighting.
venues.filmingTips: Ornate ceiling = complex lighting setup. Elevated stages require long lenses. Crew parking available but limited.

venues.name: Business Design Centre
venues.description: Victorian Grade II listed building in Islington. 4,500 sq meters of elegant event space. Popular for B2B conferences, product launches, and corporate events.
venues.filmingTips: Beautiful natural light but mixed with spotlights. Limited rigging points. Intimate scale suits close-up interviews.

venues.name: Queen Elizabeth II Centre
venues.description: Modern 6,000 sq meter venue in Westminster. Flexible layouts, excellent lighting infrastructure, and direct access to iconic London landmarks.
venues.filmingTips: State-of-the-art AV infrastructure. Excellent power distribution. High-profile events mean security protocols.

venues.name: The Brewery
venues.description: 1,600 sq meter converted Victorian brewery in Chiswell Street. Exposed brick, soaring ceilings, natural light. Premium venue for exclusive events.
venues.filmingTips: Dramatic industrial aesthetic. Harsh shadows in some areas. Wide-angle lenses work well. Atmospheric b-roll opportunities.

venues.name: Tobacco Dock
venues.description: 12,000 sq meter historic warehouse on the Thames. Raw, flexible event space hosting large conferences, product launches, and experiential events.
venues.filmingTips: Massive open spaces allow creative camera positioning. Rippling water reflections outside. Weather can be unpredictable.

newyork.introText: We film at NYC's premier event spaces, from the sprawling Javits Center to intimate Manhattan hotel ballrooms. Our New York crews understand the unique challenges of filming in high-rise buildings, handling crowds, and navigating tight timelines.

venues.name: Javits Center
venues.description: 550,000+ sq ft convention center on the Hudson River. Major venue for trade shows, conferences, and large-scale events. State-of-the-art facilities.
venues.filmingTips: Massive open floor plan requires strategic positioning. Wireless range critical for large halls. Permits required. Ample power distribution.

venues.name: New York Hilton Midtown
venues.description: 60,000+ sq ft of event space in Times Square. Multiple ballrooms and breakout rooms. Premium hotel venue for conferences, galas, and corporate events.
venues.filmingTips: Elegant interiors with warm lighting. Built-in AV infrastructure. Security protocols for high-profile events. Limited ceiling rigging.

venues.name: Metropolitan Pavilion
venues.description: 55,000 sq ft raw event space in Chelsea. Soaring ceilings, dramatic skylighting. Flexible layout for fashion shows, product launches, galas.
venues.filmingTips: Stunning natural light during day. Minimal built-in infrastructure requires custom setup. Excellent for creative camera work.

venues.name: NYC Armoury on Park Avenue South
venues.description: 43,000 sq ft historic venue with 60-foot ceilings. Iconic location for high-end corporate events, fashion shows, and conferences.
venues.filmingTips: Dramatic architectural elements. High ceilings offer unique camera angles. Industrial aesthetic. Custom lighting often required.

venues.name: The Plaza Hotel
venues.description: Iconic luxury hotel with 50,000+ sq ft of event space. Grand ballrooms, intimate breakout rooms. Premium venue for VIP events and conferences.
venues.filmingTips: Ornate, elegant interiors. Professional AV infrastructure. Often requires discretion for high-profile attendees.

venues.name: Pier 92 (Hudson River)
venues.description: 100,000+ sq ft waterfront event space. Flexible venue for conferences, product launches, and large-scale experiential events.
venues.filmingTips: Open floor plan allows for large-scale setups. Waterfront b-roll opportunities. Weather considerations important.

losangeles.introText: We film at LA's most dynamic event venues, from sprawling convention centers to exclusive rooftop venues with skyline views. Our Los Angeles crews are experts at managing outdoor shoots, natural California light, and high-profile entertainment industry events.

venues.name: Los Angeles Convention Center
venues.description: 600,000 sq ft waterfront convention center. Major venue for trade shows, conferences, and large-scale events with modern AV infrastructure.
venues.filmingTips: Multiple halls require crew positioning strategy. Excellent natural light from waterfront. State-of-the-art power systems.

venues.name: Beverly Hilton
venues.description: 150,000+ sq ft of luxury event space. Multiple ballrooms, garden terraces with city views. Premium venue for galas, product launches, corporate events.
venues.filmingTips: Elegant interiors. Outdoor terraces offer natural light and scenic backdrops. Professional AV support. High-profile security.

venues.name: Petree Hall at Barnsdall Park
venues.description: Mid-century modern architecture with 10,000+ sq ft of event space. Iconic LA venue with historic significance. Perfect for design-forward events.
venues.filmingTips: Beautiful architectural lines. Natural light through skylights. Limited built-in AV requires custom setup. Outdoor courtyard opportunities.

venues.name: The Broad Stage at Santa Monica College
venues.description: 1,200-seat theater and event space. Premium venue for conferences, product launches, performances with professional stage setup.
venues.filmingTips: Professional theater lighting and AV infrastructure. Wide stage ideal for keynotes. Excellent acoustics.

venues.name: Soho Warehouse Los Angeles
venues.description: Members-only creative space in West Hollywood. Rooftop venue with skyline views. Trendy location for tech launches and creative industry events.
venues.filmingTips: Stunning rooftop backdrop. Natural daylight. Modern aesthetic. Multiple levels for dynamic coverage.

venues.name: JW Marriott at LA Live
venues.description: 250,000+ sq ft of event space in downtown LA. Multiple ballrooms, flexible breakout space. Premium hotel venue for conferences and corporate events.
venues.filmingTips: Modern architecture with excellent lighting. Built-in high-speed internet and AV. Downtown skyline access for exterior shots.

sanfrancisco.introText: We film at SF's best event venues, from tech-forward conference centers to historic waterfront spaces. Our San Francisco crews specialize in covering startup launches, tech conferences, and corporate events with fast-paced, dynamic shooting.

venues.name: Moscone Center
venues.description: 700,000+ sq ft convention center in SOMA. Major venue for tech conferences, product launches, trade shows. State-of-the-art facilities.
venues.filmingTips: Multiple interconnected halls. Excellent AV infrastructure built-in. Wireless range can be challenging in large spaces. Ample parking.

venues.name: Palace of Fine Arts
venues.description: Iconic 1915 landmark with stunning architecture. 62,000 sq ft of event space. Premium venue for galas, product launches, weddings.
venues.filmingTips: Stunning architectural backdrop. Natural lighting is challenging—requires careful setup. Limited electricity points. Outdoor courtyard excellent for b-roll.

venues.name: Fort Mason Center
venues.description: 42,000+ sq ft waterfront venue with bay views. Historic building. Flexible space for conferences, corporate events, product launches.
venues.filmingTips: Golden Gate Bridge and water views. Natural light through large windows. Multiple event spaces in one complex. Good parking available.

venues.name: Fairmont Heritage Plaza
venues.description: 50,000+ sq ft luxury hotel event space in downtown. Multiple ballrooms, modern AV infrastructure. Premium venue for executive conferences.
venues.filmingTips: Professional hotel AV setup. Downtown location with architectural surroundings. Discreet security for corporate events.

venues.name: The Fillmore Auditorium
venues.description: Legendary 2,300-seat music venue. Professional stage, lighting, and sound infrastructure. Premium venue for product launches, conferences, performances.
venues.filmingTips: Professional lighting rig. Excellent acoustics. Historic aesthetic. Stage monitoring for speakers available.

venues.name: Industry at The Pullman
venues.description: Modern 25,000+ sq ft event venue in SOMA. Flexible raw space. Perfect for tech conferences, startup events, experiential activations.
venues.filmingTips: Clean, minimal aesthetic. Excellent lighting capabilities. Modern AV infrastructure. Multiple breakdown spaces.

chicago.introText: We film at Chicago's premier event venues, from the massive McCormick Place to elegant hotel ballrooms along the Magnificent Mile. Our Chicago crews understand the logistical complexity of large convention centers and the elegance of high-end corporate spaces.

venues.name: McCormick Place
venues.description: 2.6 million sq ft, the largest convention center in North America. World-class facilities for trade shows, conferences, large-scale events.
venues.filmingTips: Massive scale requires crew coordination. Excellent modern AV infrastructure. Multiple halls need strategic positioning. Ample power and networking.

venues.name: Chicago Athletic Association
venues.description: Luxury historic building converted to event venue. 50,000+ sq ft with rooftop lounge. Premium space for galas, product launches, corporate events.
venues.filmingTips: Beautiful historic interiors. Modern rooftop with city views. Elegant lighting design. Multiple intimate breakout spaces.

venues.name: The Palmer House Hilton
venues.description: Iconic luxury hotel with 100,000+ sq ft of event space. Multiple grand ballrooms, elegant marble interiors. Premium venue for major conferences.
venues.filmingTips: Ornate, classic hotel aesthetic. Professional AV infrastructure. High-profile security protocols. Rich lighting opportunities.

venues.name: Lacuna Lofts
venues.description: 90,000+ sq ft raw industrial space. Soaring ceilings, exposed brick, dramatic skylighting. Perfect for product launches and creative events.
venues.filmingTips: Industrial aesthetic with beautiful light. Versatile spaces for creative setup. Multiple level opportunities. Modern AV add-on required.

venues.name: Morgan Manufacturing
venues.description: 65,000+ sq ft converted factory space. Modern industrial aesthetic. Flexible layout for conferences, product launches, corporate events.
venues.filmingTips: Soaring ceilings allow dynamic camera work. Large windows with natural light. Minimal built-in AV infrastructure. Custom setup needed.

venues.name: Navy Pier
venues.description: Iconic waterfront venue with 300,000+ sq ft of event space. Lake Michigan views, outdoor terrace. Flexible spaces for all event types.
venues.filmingTips: Stunning water and skyline backdrops. Outdoor shooting opportunities. Weather considerations important. Multiple indoor/outdoor options.

toronto.introText: We film at Toronto's top event venues, from the waterfront International Centre to elegant downtown hotels. Our Toronto crews are experts at managing Canadian venue logistics and capturing the vibrant energy of Canada's largest city.

venues.name: International Centre
venues.description: 400,000+ sq ft convention center in West Toronto. Major venue for trade shows, conferences, large-scale corporate events.
venues.filmingTips: Modern facilities with excellent AV infrastructure. Multiple halls require crew coordination. Ample parking and power distribution.

venues.name: Shangri-La Toronto
venues.description: Luxury 5-star hotel with 50,000+ sq ft of event space. Multiple ballrooms with floor-to-ceiling windows and CN Tower views.
venues.filmingTips: Stunning city views. Professional hotel AV. Modern architecture. Excellent natural light from windows.

venues.name: The Ballroom Bowl
venues.description: Historic 60,000 sq ft downtown venue. Converted industrial building with soaring ceilings. Flexible space for galas, launches, conferences.
venues.filmingTips: Dramatic architecture with excellent skylighting. Raw industrial aesthetic. Flexible lighting options. Multiple event zones.

venues.name: The Evergreen Brick Works
venues.description: Iconic 54,000+ sq ft heritage site. Historic brick building with outdoor courtyard. Premium venue for creative events and product launches.
venues.filmingTips: Beautiful historic aesthetic. Excellent outdoor space. Natural light through large windows. Trendy venue for tech and creative industries.

venues.name: Royal Ontario Museum (ROM)
venues.description: World-class museum with unique event spaces. 100,000+ sq ft available. Premium venue for galas, product launches, corporate dinners.
venues.filmingTips: Iconic museum backdrops. Multiple dramatic event spaces. Professional venue management. Security and logistics handled by venue.

venues.name: Metro Toronto Convention Centre
venues.description: 600,000+ sq ft waterfront convention center. World-class facilities overlooking Lake Ontario. Major venue for trade shows and conferences.
venues.filmingTips: Excellent AV infrastructure. Lake views. Modern facilities. Ample power distribution. Strategic crew positioning needed.

sydney.introText: We film at Sydney's most iconic event venues, from the Opera House precinct to world-class convention centers. Our Sydney crews specialize in capturing the dynamic energy of Australia's business hub while leveraging stunning harbour and city backdrops.

venues.name: Sydney Convention and Exhibition Centre
venues.description: 100,000+ sq ft state-of-the-art venue at Darling Harbour. Major venue for conferences, trade shows, product launches with harbour views.
venues.filmingTips: Modern AV infrastructure. Harbour views through large windows. Flexible modular spaces. Excellent parking and catering.

venues.name: Sydney Opera House
venues.description: Iconic UNESCO World Heritage Site. Multiple theaters and function spaces. Premium venue for galas, conferences, product launches.
venues.filmingTips: Iconic architectural backdrop. Professional theater AV setup. High-security protocols. Stunning exterior b-roll opportunities.

venues.name: Hyatt Regency Sydney
venues.description: Luxury hotel with 40,000+ sq ft of event space overlooking The Rocks. Multiple ballrooms, garden terrace with harbour views.
venues.filmingTips: Stunning harbour views. Historic district backdrop. Professional hotel AV. Multiple interior and exterior shooting options.

venues.name: Pier One Sydney Harbour
venues.description: 40,000+ sq ft heritage venue on working harbour. Raw industrial space with water views. Unique backdrop for product launches and galas.
venues.filmingTips: Stunning waterfront backdrop. Industrial aesthetic with heritage charm. Multiple interior spaces. Weather considerations important.

venues.name: UTS Aerial (University of Technology Sydney)
venues.description: 16-level building in inner city with rooftop event space and 360-degree city views. Flexible venue for corporate events and conferences.
venues.filmingTips: Panoramic city views. Modern architectural backdrop. Multiple floor options. Contemporary aesthetic.

venues.name: The Darling at The Star
venues.description: 25,000+ sq ft luxury event space in Pyrmont. Modern design with multiple configurations. Premium venue for corporate events and galas.
venues.filmingTips: Contemporary design. Professional AV infrastructure. Multiple breakout spaces. Flexible layouts.

amsterdam.introText: We film at Amsterdam's premier event venues, from world-class convention centers to historic canal-side locations. Our Amsterdam crews understand the unique character of Dutch venues and specialize in capturing the vibrant energy of Europe's business hub.

venues.name: Amsterdam RAI
venues.description: 170,000+ sq ft convention and exhibition center. Major venue for trade shows, conferences, product launches. State-of-the-art facilities.
venues.filmingTips: Modern AV infrastructure. Multiple interconnected halls. Excellent natural light. Strategic positioning needed for large spaces.

venues.name: Okura Hotel Amsterdam
venues.description: Luxury 5-star hotel with 45,000+ sq ft of event space. Multiple elegant ballrooms overlooking the Amstel River.
venues.filmingTips: Elegant Japanese-influenced design. River views through large windows. Professional hotel AV. Premium atmosphere.

venues.name: Amsterdam Museum Quarter
venues.description: Historic buildings with flexible event spaces. Canal-side locations with authentic Dutch architecture. Unique atmosphere for premium events.
venues.filmingTips: Authentic historic interiors. Beautiful canal backdrops. Limited modern AV infrastructure requires custom setup.

venues.name: Seat to Sofa
venues.description: 20,000+ sq ft design-forward event space in Westerpark. Flexible, contemporary venue for product launches, conferences, corporate events.
venues.filmingTips: Modern design aesthetic. Natural light from large windows. Minimalist backdrop perfect for product photography.

venues.name: Conservatorium Hotel Amsterdam
venues.description: Luxury historic building converted to hotel with 35,000+ sq ft of event space. Grand architecture, ornate interiors.
venues.filmingTips: Historic elegance. Ornate architectural details. Professional AV setup. Premium, exclusive atmosphere.

venues.name: Ndsm Wharf
venues.description: Former shipyard converted to cultural venue. 80,000+ sq ft of flexible space. Unique industrial-creative aesthetic for launches and galas.
venues.filmingTips: Dramatic industrial architecture. Large open spaces. Excellent for creative staging. Natural light through large windows.

berlin.introText: We film at Berlin's cutting-edge event venues, from historic landmarks to ultra-modern conference centers. Our Berlin crews are experts at capturing the city's dynamic creative energy and unique architectural character.

venues.name: Berlin Convention Center (BCC)
venues.description: 120,000+ sq ft modern convention center. State-of-the-art facilities for conferences, trade shows, corporate events.
venues.filmingTips: Excellent AV infrastructure. Modern architecture. Multiple flexible spaces. Good natural light.

venues.name: Messe Berlin
venues.description: 250,000+ sq ft exhibition center. Major venue for trade shows, conferences, large-scale events.
venues.filmingTips: Multiple halls require coordination. Excellent modern AV. Strategic positioning for large spaces. Ample power distribution.

venues.name: Adlon Hotel Berlin
venues.description: Historic luxury hotel with 40,000+ sq ft of event space. Iconic location on Pariser Platz overlooking Brandenburg Gate.
venues.filmingTips: Iconic backdrop (Brandenburg Gate visible). Historic elegance. Professional hotel AV. Premium corporate atmosphere.

venues.name: Urban Spree
venues.description: 20,000+ sq ft raw industrial event space in Friedrichshain. Former factory with soaring ceilings and street art aesthetic.
venues.filmingTips: Industrial-artistic aesthetic. Flexible open space. Minimal built-in infrastructure. Trendy venue for creative industries.

venues.name: Kesselhaus (Urban Nation)
venues.description: 15,000+ sq ft historic event space in former power station. Raw industrial architecture with modern amenities.
venues.filmingTips: Dramatic industrial aesthetic. Historic brick. Modern AV add-on available. Unique Berlin character.

venues.name: Ritz-Carlton Berlin
venues.description: Luxury hotel with 50,000+ sq ft of event space. Modern architecture, sophisticated design. Premium venue for executive conferences.
venues.filmingTips: Contemporary luxury design. Professional AV infrastructure. High-profile event support. Elegant interiors.

venues.name: Palais Omnisports de Paris-Bercy
venues.description: 55,000 sq meter multi-purpose arena and convention center. Major venue for conferences, large-scale events, product launches.
venues.filmingTips: Modern facilities with excellent AV. Multiple event configurations. Good parking. Strategic crew positioning.

venues.name: Versailles Palace
venues.description: Iconic historic palace with flexible event spaces. Legendary venue for high-profile galas, state events, premium product launches.
venues.filmingTips: Iconic architectural backdrop. Historic elegance. Limited modern AV—custom setup required. Extraordinary b-roll opportunities.

venues.name: Le Marais District (Hotel Ambassade)
venues.description: Historic Parisian neighborhood with flexible event venues. Authentic 17th-century architecture. Premium location for sophisticated events.
venues.filmingTips: Historic Parisian character. Charming narrow streets for exterior shots. Intimate event spaces. Limited parking.

venues.name: Pullman Paris La Défense
venues.description: Luxury hotel with 25,000+ sq ft of event space in business district. Modern architecture, professional AV infrastructure.
venues.filmingTips: Contemporary design. Modern AV systems. Business district backdrop. Professional corporate atmosphere.

venues.name: Musée du Louvre Event Spaces
venues.description: World-renowned museum with exclusive event spaces. Iconic location for premium galas and product launches. Direct Louvre access.
venues.filmingTips: Iconic museum backdrop. Professional venue management. High-security protocols. Extraordinary event atmosphere.

venues.name: Palais Garnier (Paris Opera House)
venues.description: Historic opera house with 2,000+ seat theater and balconies. Legendary venue for galas, conferences, performances.
venues.filmingTips: Ornate theatrical aesthetic. Professional stage AV. Iconic interior design. Premium event support.

venues.name: Emirates Palace

venues.filmingTips: Stunning architectural details. Professional AV infrastructure. High-profile security protocols. Exterior water views excellent for b-roll.

venues.name: Abu Dhabi National Exhibition Centre (ADNEC)

venues.name: Manarat Al Saadiyat

venues.name: St. Regis Abu Dhabi
venues.description: Ultra-luxury hotel with 45,000+ sq ft of event space. Multiple ballrooms, contemporary Arab-inspired design.

venues.name: Cleveland Clinic Abu Dhabi Events
venues.description: 30,000 sq ft modern conference and event spaces. State-of-the-art medical and corporate event venue.
venues.filmingTips: Contemporary clinical design. Excellent AV infrastructure. Modern aesthetic. Professional atmosphere.

venues.name: Al Maryah Island Convention Centre
venues.description: 40,000+ sq ft multipurpose venue in business district. Modern design, flexible configurations.
venues.filmingTips: Downtown skyline views. Modern AV systems. Strategic positioning for multiple sessions. Good parking.

venues.name: Empire State Plaza Convention Center
venues.description: 220,000+ sq ft convention center with iconic modernist architecture. Major venue for conferences, trade shows, exhibitions.

venues.name: The Omni Albany Hotel
venues.description: Luxury hotel with 35,000+ sq ft of event space. Multiple ballrooms, contemporary design.
venues.filmingTips: Professional hotel AV. Elegant interiors. Easy parking. Multiple event room options.

venues.name: Albany Hilton

venues.filmingTips: Good AV infrastructure. Downtown backdrop. Professional event support. Convenient location.

venues.description: 8,000-seat amphitheater and 5,000+ sq ft indoor event space. Premium venue near Albany.
